summary: Iteration 11: Complete testing of new features - Login page demo credentials removal, Start Day manual balance input, Products page bulk TVA and Delete All buttons, ANAF v9 CUI search, and 12-hour held order expiry. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.

minor.issue: CUI 14399840 was cached with wrong data (SC ANDREPAU CONSTRUCT SRL instead of DANTE INTERNATIONAL). Fixed by clearing cache. Cache invalidation strategy may need review.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (minor)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful with admin/admin123
Backend: Casier login successful with casier/casier123
Backend: PUT /api/products-all/bulk-tva requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: PUT /api/products-all/bulk-tva requires admin role (403 for casier)
Backend: PUT /api/products-all/bulk-tva rejects invalid TVA values (negative, >100)
Backend: PUT /api/products-all/bulk-tva successfully updates all products TVA
Backend: DELETE /api/products-all/delete requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: DELETE /api/products-all/delete requires admin role (403 for casier)
Backend: DELETE /api/products-all/delete endpoint exists and is accessible
Backend: POST /api/anaf/search-cui requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/anaf/search-cui rejects empty CUI (400)
Backend: POST /api/anaf/search-cui rejects invalid CUI (400)
Backend: POST /api/anaf/search-cui finds DANTE INTERNATIONAL SA for CUI 14399840 via ANAF v9
Backend: POST /api/anaf/search-cui handles RO prefix correctly
Backend: POST /api/held-orders creates order with 12-hour expiry
Backend: GET /api/daily/opening-summary returns cash balance and status
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations works for manual starting balance
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with TVA field
Frontend: Login page does NOT show demo credentials (admin/admin123, casier/casier123)
Frontend: Login form has username, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Start Day page has 'Seteaza sold manual de inceput de zi (optional)' link
Frontend: Start Day page shows manual balance input after clicking link
Frontend: Products page shows 'Schimbă TVA' button (admin only)
Frontend: Products page shows 'Șterge Toate' red button (admin only)
Frontend: TVA dialog shows preset buttons (9%, 19%, 21%, 25%)
Frontend: TVA dialog input updates when preset button clicked
Frontend: Delete All dialog requires typing 'STERGE TOATE' to confirm
Frontend: Delete All confirm button is disabled until correct text typed
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning) - not blocking functionality
Note: ANAF CUI cache had stale data for CUI 14399840 - consider adding cache invalidation or TTL
seed_data_creation: Cleared stale cache entry for CUI 14399840 to allow fresh ANAF v9 lookup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 tested all requested features. Key findings: (1) Login page correctly removed demo credentials - only shows username/password form. (2) Start Day page has optional manual balance input with 'Seteaza sold manual de inceput de zi (optional)' link that reveals input field. (3) Products page has 'Schimbă TVA' button that opens dialog with 9%, 19%, 21%, 25% preset buttons. (4) Products page has 'Șterge Toate' red button that requires typing 'STERGE TOATE' to confirm. (5) ANAF v9 endpoint works correctly - tested with CUI 14399840 (DANTE INTERNATIONAL SA). (6) Held orders expire after 12 hours (verified in code at line 1902: timedelta(hours=12)). (7) Bridge URL updated to andrepau.com in fiscal_bridge.py.

login_page_demo_removal.description: Login page no longer shows demo credentials (admin/admin123, casier/casier123)

start_day_manual_balance.description: Start Day page has optional manual balance input with 'Seteaza sold manual de inceput de zi (optional)' link

products_delete_all.note: Requires typing 'STERGE TOATE' to enable confirm button
